stemHtml: An aerodrome reports its lighting output as 38 candelas. What is the definition of a candela?

options.a: The light output measured at 10 feet from a candle made of whale fat.
options.b: The light has a Candle Power (CP) of 38.
options.c: This unit is non-standard and may be specific to the aerodrome.
options.d: A measure of energy wasted as sound.
